pass_summaries.summary: All pass-scoped structural/craft findings were addressed in-place: pre-ask momentum now carries unresolved debt/trust tension, and the emotional apex now lands as costly, behavior-driven renegotiation with embodied consequence.

Addressed both dialogue-pass findings by increasing leverage cadence in the core confrontation and replacing abstract procedural keyword signaling with character-true concrete language while preserving continuity and chapter contract.

Resolved both prose/copyedit findings by replacing autopilot gesture shorthand with scene-specific body action and by grounding the grief peak in embodied detail without sanitization; heading, continuity, and dialogue register were preserved.
